case_title: IVAN M FARMERS VS. FRANKLIN FLORES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2014 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO OCT-31-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MUST BRING HIS OWN SPANISH INTERPRETER AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-26-2019 IS CONTINUED FOR FINAL PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-26-2019 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IVAN M. FARMERS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FRANKLIN FLORES, ASSISTED SHANNON RAINTREE, SPANISH INTERPERTER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR STATES PURSUANT TO THE THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT HE HAS MADE 24 PAYMENTS OF 200.00 A MONTH STARTING NOVEMBER 10, 2017. TOTAL NUMBER PAYMENTS TO SATISFY THE JUDGMENT OF $4477.00 IS 23 PAYMENTS WITH THE LAST PAYMENT DUE ON OCT-11-2019. DEFENDANT IS INSTRUCTED TO HAVE THE PLAINTIFF FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGEMNT. IF NO APPEARANCES, MATTER WILL BE TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE: CURTIS E. A. KARNOW; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR FINAL PROGRESS REPORT. MATTER CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 26, 2019 AT 11:00 A.M. DEPT. 506. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2017 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-30-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES REACHED AN AGREEMENT. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR WILL PAY THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR $200.00 A MONTH BY THE 10TH OF EVERY MONTH BEGINNING NOVEMBER 10, 2017 UNTIL THE FULL AMOUNT DUE. PAYMENTS WILL BE BY MONEY ORDERS. NO APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED IF PAYMENTS ARE MADE. THE MATTER WILL BE CONTINUED EVERY THREE MONTHS. JUDGMENT CREDITOR IVAN FARMERS IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR FRANKLIN FLORES IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY ELLEN ROSENTHAL, CERITIFED SPANISH COURT INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
